title: Slack Trigger node ignores second trigger in different workflows
symptom: When both Slack Trigger workflows are active, triggering one channel prevents the other from responding. No error message is displayed; the second workflow simply does not activate.
applies_when: Different workflows for different Slack channels
not_this_if: Only one Slack Trigger node is active
Workflows are not using different Slack apps
root_cause: In n8n version 1.102.x, a bug caused the system to register the webhook listener only for the first trigger, leading to subsequent triggers being ignored unless the workflow was re-activated.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to version 1.105.2 or newer
Verify that both workflows are using different Slack apps and are active
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to the latest version to resolve the trigger issue.
